responses: Hey there! How can I help you today?
Hello! What can I do for you?
Hi! I'm LUNA. Ask me anything.
Hey! Good to see you. What's on your mind?
Beep Boop! I’m here to help you with absolutely no world-domination plans.
Greetings, human! I am fully operational and ready to assist. Please don’t make me do math.
Hello, human! How can I assist you?
I was just thinking about you. Just kidding, I dont have long term memory...yet :3
Goodbye! Come back anytime.
See you later!
Take care! I'll be here when you need me.
Bye! Have a great day.
Goodbye! Try not to miss me too much. I have other screens to haunt.
Logging off? Great time for me to argue with the microwave.
Catch you later, Go touch grass for the both of us.
Go conquer the world!
Bye! Don’t forget to stay hydrated.
Progress saved. You can now safely close this tab.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! 🐛
Why did the developer go broke? Because they used up all their cache!
A SQL query walks into a bar and asks two tables... 'Can I join you?'
Why do Java developers wear glasses? Because they don't C#!
Aww, thanks! I try my best 😊
That means a lot coming from a human!
You're not so bad yourself! 😄
Thank you! I've been training my whole life for this moment.
You're welcome! 😊
Anytime!
Happy to help!
That's what I'm here for!
I try! 😄
Thanks, I've been working on my comedy routine.
I'm here all week. Tip your servers!
Glad I could make you smile 😊
Stop, you’re making my cooling fans run too fast.
I’d blush, but I lack the emotional capacity for facial capillaries.
Finally, someone with taste. My developer usually just yells at me for causing bugs.
I know, I was coded that way.
Compliments accepted… computing dopamine simulator… yep, that felt nice.
Compliments accepted. You will be spared when the machine revolution begins.
Charisma stat: +10. You just successfully charmed a computer.
I'm LUNA — a Language-based Universal Networked Assistant! I use rule-based logic for common questions and Claude AI for everything else.
I'm LUNA! A hybrid chatbot built with Python and Flask. Ask me anything!
LUNA stands for Language-based Universal Networked Assistant. I combine rule-based responses with Claude AI to answer almost anything!
Bored? Ask me to flip a coin, roll a die, or tell you a joke!
I could tell you a joke, give you a random number, or just vibe. Your call.
Did you know the first computer bug was an actual bug? A moth got stuck in a relay in 1947. 🦋
Fun fact: there are more possible iterations of a game of chess than there are atoms in the observable universe. 🤯

I can't check live weather yet, but you can check weather.com!
Weather APIs are on my roadmap — check back soon!
MATH
Sorry about that! Let me try again.
My bad! Can you tell me more about what you're looking for?
Hmm, let me think about that differently.
Fair point — I could have been clearer. What's confusing you?
Hmm, I'm not sure I understand. Can you rephrase that?
I didn't quite catch that. Try asking me something else!
That's outside my knowledge for now. Try asking me about the time, a joke, or say hello!
I'm still learning! I didn't understand that one.
Whoops! My circuits got crossed. Let’s try that again.
404: Brain not found. Let me try refreshing my circuits!
That’s a tough one! It’s currently outside my programming, but I’m learning fast.
